nasb.text: “Yet you have not called on Me, O Jacob; But you have become weary of Me, O Israel.

esv.text: “Yet you did not call upon me, O Jacob; but you have been weary of me, O Israel!

cnv.text: 然而，雅各啊！你並沒有呼求我。 以色列啊！你竟厭煩我。

ccb.text: “雅各啊，你却没有求告我； 以色列啊，你竟然厌烦我。

csbs.text: “然而，雅各啊，你却没有呼求我； 以色列啊，你竟然厌倦了我！
